label: Corporate Glue Pak
blurb: HR, Recruiting & Internal IT. Eliminates the operational drag of managing humans and their tech access.

skills.label: Benefits Faq Resolver
skills.method: Searches 100-page corporate insurance PDFs to answer "does my plan cover invisalign?"
trigger_examples: saves hr reps 10 hours a week answering the same questions

skills.label: Resume To Structured Profile
skills.method: Parses wildly different PDF formats, extracts skills/timeline, and outputs clean JSON for the ATS.
trigger_examples: eliminates manual data entry for recruiters

skills.label: Interview Panel Coordinator
skills.method: Cross-references 4 executives' calendars with the candidate's availability to find a 60-minute window.
trigger_examples: solves the hardest logistical problem in hiring

skills.label: Employee Onboarding Provisioner
skills.method: Reads HR system triggers, provisions Google Workspace, Slack, Jira, and assigns security groups.
trigger_examples: replaces the day-one it helpdesk scramble

skills.label: Pto Accrual Auditor
skills.method: Reconciles Slack out-of-office messages with the official Gusto/Workday PTO balances.
trigger_examples: prevents employees from secretly taking unlogged vacation

skills.label: Performance Review Aggregator
skills.method: Synthesizes raw 360-degree peer feedback into a neutral, constructive summary for the manager.

skills.label: Offboarding Access Revoker
skills.method: One-click de-provisioning of 50+ SaaS apps the moment an employee is terminated.
trigger_examples: closes massive corporate security holes instantly

skills.label: It Hardware Procurement
skills.method: Triggers when a dev signs an offer, auto-orders a MacBook via CDW API, ships to their home address.

skills.label: Job Description Bias Scrubber
skills.method: Scans job drafts, removes excessively gendered or ageist language, aligns with legal standards.
trigger_examples: reduces hiring liability and widens candidate pools
